name: shopify-revenue-audit
description: Hazn job plugin — deep Shopify revenue audit. 4-module composite scoring (AI Discovery 30%, Search & Catalog 20%, Conversion Experience 30%, Technical Foundation 20%), P25-P75 honest quantification with overlap and execution haircuts, mandatory 4-pass red-team on every projection, Editorial Warmth v2 branded HTML deliverable. Depends on the hazn runtime kernel for red-team skills, brand resolution, and editorial rendering.
